entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: The crop species Cicer arietinum L. being studied for genetic divergence

entities.name: HYDERABAD
entities.description: The location of ICRISAT from where the minicore collections were obtained

entities.name: RAINFED
entities.description: Environmental condition characterized by reliance on rainfall, used in environments E1 and E2

entities.name: IRRIGATED
entities.description: Environmental condition characterized by artificial water supply, used in environment E3

entities.name: MAHALANOBIS' D2 STATISTIC
entities.description: A statistical method used to measure genetic distance and group genotypes into clusters

entities.name: POD NUMBER
entities.description: A quantitative trait measuring the number of pods per plant

entities.name: EARLINESS
entities.description: A quantitative trait measuring the time to maturity

entities.name: PLANT HEIGHT
entities.description: A quantitative trait measuring the vertical growth of the plant

entities.name: PODS/PLANT
entities.description: A quantitative trait measuring the number of pods produced per plant

entities.name: 100 SEEDWEIGHT
entities.description: A quantitative trait measuring the weight of 100 seeds

entities.name: SEED YIELD
entities.description: A quantitative trait measuring the total seed production

entities.name: TERTIARY BRANCHES/PLANT
entities.description: A quantitative trait measuring the number of tertiary branches per plant

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERGENCE
entities.description: The degree of genetic difference between genotypes or clusters

entities.name: MINICORE COLLECTION
entities.description: A representative subset of a larger germplasm collection used for genetic study

entities.name: GEOGRAPHIC ORIGIN
entities.description: The geographical source from which the germplasm lines were collected

entities.name: GEOGRAPHICAL DIVERSITY
entities.description: The variation in genotypes based on their geographical distribution

entities.name: ADAPTIVE GENE COMPLEX
entities.description: A group of genes that together contribute to the adaptation of a plant to its environment

entities.name: VARIETAL IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: The process of enhancing crop traits through breeding

entities.name: HYBRIDIZATION
entities.description: The process of crossing genetically different genotypes to create offspring

entities.name: MULTIPLE CROSSING PROGRAMME
entities.description: A breeding strategy involving multiple crosses to combine desirable traits

entities.name: TRANSGRESSIVE SEGREGATES
entities.description: Offspring that exhibit phenotypes exceeding the range of their parents

relationships.description: The minicore collection consists of chickpea germplasm lines
The minicore collection was evaluated for genetic divergence
Mahalanobis' D2 statistic was used to analyze genetic divergence
Genetic divergence was evaluated under rainfed conditions
Genetic divergence was evaluated under irrigated conditions
The minicore collection was evaluated for pod number
The minicore collection was evaluated for earliness
The minicore collection was evaluated for plant height
The minicore collection was evaluated for pods per plant
The minicore collection was evaluated for 100 seedweight
The minicore collection was evaluated for seed yield
The minicore collection was evaluated for tertiary branches per plant
No parallelism was found between genetic distance and geographical diversity
Selection for adaptive gene complexes may lead to the formation of distinct clusters
Hybridization among divergent clusters is suggested for varietal improvement
Multiple crossing programmes are used to recover transgressive segregates
Hybridization is recommended between genotypes of divergent clusters
